title: camptosorus rhizophyllus
intro: Camptosorus rhizophyllus, also known as the walking fern, is a type of small, terrestrial fern native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Camptosorus rhizophyllus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant in decoctions and infusions to treat various health conditions.
